title: Chobbin Hardcore Series Pack
description: Includes all mods and resource packs used in Chobbin's YouTube Minecraft Hardcore Survival series
body:
A collection of mods that aim to enhance Minecraft's visuals and audio, while maintaining the vanilla gameplay loop and core mechanics. As seen in Chobbin's Hardcore YouTube Series.

Terrain Generation Improvements: Blooming biosphere.

Visual Improvements: Better Saturated Grass, Not Enough Animations, ETF & EMF, Particular, Visuality. 

Quality of Life Improvements: Better F3, Cherished Worlds, Experimentalist, Haul, Freecam, Mod Menu, Mouse Tweaks, Nemo's Woodcutter, Replanter Plus, Shulker Box Tooltip, Tree Harvester. Elytra Chestplate Swapper.

Audio improvements: Sounds, Sound Physics Remastered, Presence Footsteps, Simple Music Control. 

Performance Mods. All your favourites such as Sodium, Dynamic FPS, Entity Culling, FerriteCore, Iris Shaders, Sodium Extra.

Primary Shaders: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound
